channel.title: Thorpe Family History
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Thorpe Family History

item.title: Changelog
item.description: Changelog 2026-04-21 — Initial Thorpe vault bootstrap Created new Quartz vault structure for Thorpe family research.

item.title: Home
item.description: Thorpe Family Research Vault Welcome to the Thorpe family research vault.

item.title: People Directory
item.description: People Directory Confirmed Individuals from Current Source Set Robert “Butch” Thorpe Contributor who provided pedigree timeline files and methodology notes.

item.title: Robert Butch Thorpe
item.description: Robert “Butch” Thorpe Biographical Profile Name: Robert “Butch” Thorpe Role in this project: Source contributor for initial Thorpe pedigree timeline materials.

item.title: Butch Thorpe Email
item.description: Butch Thorpe Email Source file: References/raw/butch-thorpe-email.txt Sender and Context Sender signs as Butch (nickname for Robert “Butch” Thorpe).

item.title: Search Index
item.description: Search Index People Robert “Butch” Thorpe Topics Thorpe Pedigree Timelines References Butch Thorpe Email .

item.title: Thorpe Pedigree Timelines
item.description: Thorpe Pedigree Timelines This page tracks the pedigree timeline files provided by Robert “Butch” Thorpe and documents what they contain.

item.title: Thorpe Family History
item.description: A genealogical research wiki for the Thorpe family, beginning with source material shared by Robert "Butch" Thorpe.
